justification: The diff correctly migrates javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence and updates major dependencies (Spring 6, Hibernate 6, Jakarta Servlet 6) to align with Java 21, but it introduces significant spurious churn by modifying build artifacts (target/maven-status) and aggressively pruning imports in entity classes (e.g., Account.java, Acquisition.java) without showing the corresponding field/method changes, suggesting incomplete or risky refactoring. No Java 21-specific idioms (records, pattern matching, virtual threads) are utilized.
